author: hbicofbiology
install_msg: RoleDropdown loaded! Use `[p]roledropdown create #channel` to post your first role selector.
name: RoleDropdown
description: Post Discord select-menu dropdowns that let members pick and remove their own roles. Dropdowns persist across bot restarts. Supports up to 25 roles per dropdown, optional labels, descriptions, and emojis per role.
end_user_data_statement: This cog does not store any user data. Role selections are applied directly and not retained.
